examples: I just had a super-duper meal in the restaurant.
I do think this is super duper cool though, especially as I've been working on a thing that USES it.
And I made sure everyone knew my life was super-duper awesome with or without a man - my adorable apartment!
The super-duper multicoloured backdrop to painted paper plates and crafty filler in material is just not necessary.
They should be earning a super-duper liquidity premium and that is essentially my core definition of a bubble.
